description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: check_code, moban, and run_tests. Use the coala/base Docker image for the check_code job and run the command coala-ci. For the moban job, use the python:3.5 image, run a before_script that installs moban via pip and clones the setupmobans and coala-mobans repositories, then execute moban followed by git diff --exit-code. For the run_tests job, also use python:3.5, install dependencies with pip3 install -r requirements.txt and pip3 install -r test-requirements.txt, and finally run py.test --cov. All jobs run in the default test stage with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
